data.title: Objective Bug Reporting Protocol
data.description: Create a new bug reporting protocol that enforces strictly factual, evidence-based bug reports. The protocol acts as a 'black box recorder' for the system, eliminating root cause speculation, hindsight bias, forced debugging steps, and low-value tickets. It defines a structured output format with three fields (Title, Priority, Description) and strict constraints (the 'Zero Inference' rule). See the full protocol specification in the epic comments.
